error_signature: The item has no binary field ‘file’ [item 0]
title: Binary field mismatch in HTTP Request nodes
symptom: When executing the workflow, an error occurs stating that the item has no binary field ‘file’. This prevents the workflow from proceeding correctly.
applies_when: Binary data is expected in the workflow
not_this_if: Only one HTTP Request node is used
root_cause: The error occurs because the output field name from the first HTTP Request node does not match the expected input field name in the second HTTP Request node. This mismatch leads to the absence of the required binary field in the subsequent node.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the first HTTP Request node
Ensure 'Put Output in Field' is set to 'file'
Open the settings of the second HTTP Request node
Set 'Input Data Field Name' to 'file' to match the first node
agent_instruction: Ensure the output field name in the first HTTP Request node matches the input field name in the second HTTP Request node.
